## Testing

Run from the **repository root** (replace with N/A if docs-only):

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test` (if schemas or shared logic changed)
- [ ] `pnpm build` (if build-affecting)

Any persistence, env, or API contract risk? How would you roll back?
